# Feature Request

Your issue may already be added or pending addition!
Please check out our [active issues](https://github.com/bladeacer/ObsiThemeRef/issues)
and check if your theme [already exists](https://obsithemeref.readthedocs.io/en/latest/themes/) on the site
before creating one.
